settings.title: How pickup works
settings.teaser: Browse today's case, order online or walk in.
settings.panel_body:
Two ways to grab a same-day cake:

  • Walk in. 328 E 75th Street, Tuesday through Sunday. What's in the case is what's available. No appointment, no holdback.
  • Order ahead online. Browse the menu on this page, pay through Shopify, and walk in to pick up — usually within an hour, often less.

Either way, you're talking to the same baker who pulled it out of the oven this morning.

settings.title: What we bake daily
settings.teaser: Caramel, German chocolate, red velvet, cupcakes, pies.
settings.panel_body:
Same-day cases shift with the season and the morning, but you'll almost always find:

  • Whole cakes — caramel, German chocolate, red velvet, lemon, strawberry shortcake.
  • Slices — premium and house, fresh-cut, ready to go.
  • Cupcakes — singles, four-packs, dozen boxes.
  • Pies, pound cakes, cheesecakes — sweet potato, lemon icebox, key lime, banana pudding.
  • Candy — sea salt caramels, turtles, meltaways, hand-poured.

Want something specific? Call before you come — we'll tell you what's still on the shelf.

settings.title: Before you come
settings.teaser: A few honest things to know.
settings.panel_body:
Three things to keep in mind:

No custom writing on same-day cakes. We can do "Happy Birthday" or a name if you've got an hour and we're not slammed — call ahead. Custom designs need 3 days.

Whole cakes go fast on weekends. Friday afternoon and Saturday morning, the case empties quickly. Order online by 11 AM to lock yours in.

Tuesday is our quiet day. Best time to come in if you want to chat about a custom order or browse without a line.

Questions? Call (773) 570-7676. We answer.
